+ back to UGC Video Creator Workflow
UGC Video Creator Workflow

Step 13 — Video Edit

The last step is editing. You can do this in Canva, InShot, the Instagram Edits app, or similar. Select your aspect ratio, upload all your footage, and stack your B-roll shots over your talkie clips following your shot list. Add text and graphics as needed.

Canva uses the shared team Glamrs login.

← Previous step
